title: Inside the Secretive and Lucrative World of Orchid Breeding
shortdescription: Behind the beauty of orchids lies a secretive global industry where breeders spend years developing rare flower varieties worth thousands of dollars in the luxury plant market.

title: London Traders Hit by ‘King of Mangoes’ Shortage
shortdescription: London traders are facing a shortage of Alphonso mangoes, known as the “king of mangoes,” due to poor harvests in India and rising transport costs linked to Middle East tensions.
description: London traders are facing a shortage of Alphonso mangoes, known as the “king of mangoes,” due to poor harvests in India and rising transport costs linked to Middle East tensions.

title: Asian Stocks Fall as Wall Street Tech Sell-Off Weighs on Global Markets
shortdescription: Asian shares fell Thursday after fresh declines in technology sectors weighed on Wall Street.
description: Asian shares fell Thursday after fresh declines in technology sectors weighed on Wall Street, raising concerns over high valuations and the AI rally.
author: Henry Willy

title: Tesla Unveils Model 3 Redesign and $25K Entry Model – Stock Jumps 12% on Production Timeline
shortdescription: Elon Musk reveals new compact EV will begin deliveries in Q2 2026, targeting 5 million units annually.

title: Amazon AWS Announces $100B AI Infrastructure Investment – Cloud Revenue Exceeds $30B Quarterly
shortdescription: World's largest cloud provider commits to building largest AI supercomputer cluster ever constructed.

title: Apple Stock Downgraded to 'Sell' After iPhone Sales Miss Q4 Estimates
shortdescription: AAPL down 5% pre-market as China market share drops to 18% from 22%.
description: Analysts cut price target to $180 – services revenue saves quarter but hardware weakness persists amid Huawei competition.

title: Oil Prices Tumble 5% as Global Oversupply Concerns Eclipse Geopolitical Tensions
shortdescription: Brent crude retreats to $70 as US inventories swell and recession fears resurface.

title: S&P 500 Hits New All-Time High: Tech Stocks Drive 18% YTD Gains
